S.FORM: Kevin Anderson kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 1, Kevin Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. Kevin Anderson hiya ga m' Engi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ke*in an*ers~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ke*in an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ke*in an*ers~ɕon ħija ɣa mʔ eŋi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
